---
title: 'Idea Log'
date: '2017-12-09T22:20:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell''s Idea Central (Random Idea Catalogue)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4424692990374660338'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/idea-log.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell_s Idea Central (Random Idea Catalogue)/feed.atom'
---

Gallop Strength's Finder: <br />
<br /><br />
List your ideas in a log/diary. These ideas will serve as a grist for your mental mill, and they might yield valuable insights. <br />
<br /><br />
These ideas could grow into more complex ideas, combine with others, or serve as fodder for storytelling. <br />
<br /><br />
Let the ideas come!
